Asmara, Matsya, Avanti and those living on the banks of the
CSrudevI. If Venus is overpowered here by another planet, he
will destroy the Dravidas, Abhiras, Ainba§thas, Trigartas, Saurast-
ras, people of Sindhu, Sauvirakas and th6 king of Kasl.
11 II
The sixth Mandala consists of the six stars, Dhanistha,
Satabhi^aj, Purva and Uttara Bhadrapada, Revat!, and A^vini.
It is auspicious and productive of abundant wealth, cattle-wealth
and bumper crops, but in some places there will be fear too. If
Venus is attacked here by another planet, the Sulikas and the
people of Gandhara and Avanti will be tormented; and people of
Videha will be killed; but cave-men, Yavanas Sakas and slaves
will prosper.
[The Sulikas are assigned to the north-west and south-east
divisions (XIV) 23,8). They are also called Culikas in the Puranas.
